name: Easy Crumb-Topped Cherry Pie
recipeIngredient: 2 Cans (1 pint each) tart cherries packed in water (NOT cherry pie filling)
2 Pillsbury deep dish pie crusts, frozen
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the cherries and reserve 1/2 cup of the juice.
2. In a large saucepan, combine the drained cherries, reserved juice, 1 cup sugar, cornstarch, and food coloring. Bring to a boil over medium heat, stirring occasionally until thickened.
3. Pour the mixture into one frozen pie crust.
4. While still frozen, break or crumble the second crust into very small pieces. Mix with the remaining 2 tablespoons sugar and cinnamon.
5. Sprinkle evenly over the cherries.
6. Bake in a preheated 425°F oven on a baking sheet for 10 minutes.
7. Reduce the oven temperature to 350°F and bake an additional 45-50 minutes.
